instructions: Optimize GPU detection in neos-driver-manager to avoid unnecessary module probing.
Evaluate if filtering lspci output directly with regex is faster than piping to grep.
Review partitioning script for opportunities to use async discard on Btrfs formatting.
Add informative progress feedback to the neos-installer-partition.sh script using simple progress bars.
Ensure Calamares branding icons and colors are consistent with the NeOS brand identity.
Review milestone outputs in partitioning script to ensure clarity.
Verify that the new auto-merge authorization does not bypass required status checks.
Audit the Calamares configuration to ensure no insecure defaults are introduced.
Audit new GPU detection logic for potential command injection or unexpected behavior.
